description: A client wants to set up an automatic monthly investment from their bank account into their portfolio.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the investment details: amount, frequency, start date, and source bank account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately captures the client's instructions for the automated investment.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the external bank account is linked and validated.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the client's checking account is properly linked for transfers.

nodes.task_description: Create the recurring investment plan in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sets up the plan to automatically invest $1000 on the 15th of each month.
